title: IT292 ARCHIVED - Taxation of elected officers of incorporated municipalities, school boards, municipal commissions and similar bodies - Canada.ca
content:
## IT292 ARCHIVED - Taxation of elected officers of incorporated municipalities, school boards, municipal commissions and similar bodies

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin outlines the policy that provides for a portion of an elected municipal officer or a member of certain other entities' expense allowance to be excluded in computing his/her income.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format it292-e.html
